meaning: n.(椋炴満)澶撮儴鏈鸿疆,榧昏疆
examples: The nosewheel strut USES a single heavy-duty bungee for shock absorbency.
The pedal transducer units send data to the BSCU via the ELACs for the nosewheel steering system.
The direct linkage steerable nosewheel, plus differential braking, provide remarkably precise ground handling and steering.
